Remedy.Organic: Remove lower infected leaves. Apply copper-based fungicide spray early in the morning.
Remedy.Chemical: Spray Mancozeb 75% WP at 2 grams per liter of water.

Remedy.Organic: Ensure proper crop rotation. Apply Neem oil spray to prevent spreading.
Remedy.Chemical: Apply Chlorothalonil fungicide according to package instructions.

Remedy.Organic: Maintain current watering schedule. No action needed.
